_meta.description: Central Pet Service Survey — 12 questions with conditional branching, consumed by visit-flow Step 5. Wording/options supplied verbatim by the supervisor on 2026-07-13 and must stay byte-for-byte identical (including the en dash in Q7's "Small format store – no Central Pet items in Cat Litter").
_meta.conditionalRules: Q4 shown only if Q3 answer != 'Fully stocked'. Q6 shown only if Q5 answer == 'No'. Q8 shown only if Q7 answer == 'No'. Q10 shown only if Q9 answer == 'No'. Q11 is always-visible free text. Q1/Q12 auto-fill to 'yes' once before/after photos (respectively) exist.
_meta.stage4Note: Stage 4 submits these answers to the prod survey; option matching against SAS's answer set will likely be by exact string. Verify every question text and option string here against the HAR's survey payload when wiring Stage 4 transmission, and flag any mismatch rather than fuzzy-matching.
_meta.stage4Verified: 2026-07-13: cross-checked byte-for-byte against GET /api/v1/surveys/questions/?survey=115502 in central pet shifts.json (survey 'Central Pet Service Survey', visit 27000510, HAR entry #198). Q2/Q3/Q7 (checkbox-type) options matched exactly, incl. Q7's en dash. Q1/Q5/Q9/Q12 (yesNo-type) options were corrected here from 'Yes'/'No' to lowercase 'yes'/'no' to match prod's actual choices[].text exactly (per T's sign-off).

questions.text: Take BEFORE photos of the Pet Supplies aisle when you arrive. Two 4ft sections per photo.
Is the Central Pet order in store for you to work to shelf?
Why were you unable to stock the section?
Why were you unable to merchandise clip strips?
Did you merchandise Central Pet items in the top shelf of the Cat Litter section?
options: Small format store – no Central Pet items in Cat Litter

questions.text: Why were you unable to merchandise items into the Cat Litter section?
Did you merchandise the Butcher Block rack?
If no, why were you unable to merchandise the Butcher Block rack?
Is there any additional feedback / issues / successes during your visit?
Take AFTER photos of the Pet Supplies aisle when you are finished. Two 4ft sections per photo.
